title: promote-cli post-install verify guard checks realpathSync(binPath).startsWith(REPO_ROOT) — literal REPO_ROOT, no path-separator boundary
body: The post-install verify guard checks realpathSync(binPath).startsWith(REPO_ROOT): literal REPO_ROOT, no trailing-separator boundary. The pre-install validation checks against REPO_ROOT_REAL (realpath-normalized) with a trailing separator. Two divergent representations of the same repo-containment property yield two manifestations: (1) missing separator boundary — a sibling directory whose path shares the REPO_ROOT string as a prefix matches as contained; (2) missing realpath normalization — a REPO_ROOT that differs from its own realpath is not matched against the binPath's resolved form. The guard aborts on match (fail-safe direction): a consistency/correctness defect, not an exploit. Class: two guards asserting one repo-containment property over divergent path representations.
resolved_by: 8d4bdc7 (iterate-3); verified VER-054 — post-install guard compares realpathSync(binPath) against REPO_ROOT_REAL + sep, matching validation
